description: Parking Jam Escape is a puzzle game where you park each car correctly to make space for the main car to escape from the parking lot. Collect coins and unlock different cars!

title: Whats Grandma Hiding
description:
Embark on a mysterious journey, where your grandma tasked you with restoring a mansion that you never knew your family had. 

Search for clues scattered throughout the estate, piecing together the mystery and unlocking hidden truths as you delve deeper into the enigmatic past. 

Utilize rewarded ads to gain valuable coins or expedite the deciphering process, enhancing your investigative prowess in this immersive item-searching adventure.

title: Crazy Chase - Car Chase Simulator
description: Crazy Chase - Car Chase Simulator is a high-speed, endless chase where survival depends on your reflexes and power-ups. Race through a stylized low-poly city, dodging cops, traffic, and collapsing obstacles while grabbing boosts like Slow-Mo, Freeze, and Nitro to escape the impossible.

title: Container Sort Puzzle
description:
Container Sort Puzzle - Sort All the Cargo!
Get ready to test your brain with Container Sort Puzzle, the ultimate cargo-sorting challenge! Load the right containers onto the right ships and become a port master!
Perfect for fans of sort games, stacking puzzles, and logic-based challenges. Whether you're a casual player or a seasoned puzzler, Container Sort Puzzle will keep your brain sharp and entertained.

title: Packing Line
description: Ship all the cans. Choose a box of the same color as the can. The game is over if you run out of space for boxes and the line stops.

title: Hard Wheels
description: Drive an awesome monster truck in Hard Wheels and overcome various challenging tracks. There are many obstacles along the way, and you will need all your driving skills to get past them.

title: Evo Gears
description: Evo Gears is a strategic tower defense game where you power up towers using gears and face enemy waves through shifting eras—from prehistoric beasts to Spartan warriors. Choose upgrades that evolve your tactics, unlock special abilities, and combine gear setups for powerful effects.
